title: Remove Duplicate Records
description: Identify duplicate records based on customer_id and date, keeping only the first occurrence.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id, date FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id, date ORDER BY date) rn FROM orders) WHERE rn = 1;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

dedupe_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id", "date").orderBy(to_date(col("date")))

result = (
    orders.withColumn("rn", row_number().over(dedupe_window))
    .filter(col("rn") == 1)
    .select("customer_id", "date")
)
